answers: Prototyping is creating an interactive simulation of your product that users can click through. It helps test ideas and gather feedback before building the actual product.
Prototype holo tomar design er ekta interactive model — click korle page change hoy, animation dekha jay. Real product er moton feel kore but code ছাড়া.
To create a prototype, use tools like Figma, InVision, Adobe XD, or Principle. Connect your screens with interactions, transitions, and gestures to simulate the real user experience.

Prototyping lets you test your ideas cheaply before development. It bridges the gap between static designs and the final product, helping stakeholders understand the vision and users provide early feedback.
